description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every pull request to the master branch, affecting specific paths. The workflow has two jobs: unit and behave. The unit job runs on multiple Linux containers (Fedora, openSUSE, CentOS, Debian, and Ubuntu) with a matrix strategy, installing dependencies, checking out the code, and running unit tests. The behave job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the unit job, installs dependencies, checks out the code, and runs behave tests.
